meta.title: M-EasyTools AI+ — One Platform. Nine Powerful Systems.
meta.description: M-EasyTools AI+ brings together Content, Social, Email, Ads, SEO, Commerce, Sales, Productivity and GAO tools — all in one AI-native platform built to grow your business faster.

hero.badge: M-EasyTools AI+ — Powered by Modus AI Associates
hero.desc: M-EasyTools AI+ brings together Content, Social, Email, Ads, SEO, Commerce, Sales, Productivity and GAO tools — all in one AI-native platform built to grow your business faster.

systems.title_html:
Everything your marketing needs,
in one platform
systems.sub: Click on any system below to get started — sign up or log in and you'll be taken directly to that system.
systems.note: All 9 systems are included in one platform. Sign up once, access everything.

s1.desc: Generate blog posts, landing pages, articles and long-form content in seconds with AI.

s2.desc: Create scroll-stopping social media content for Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok and more.
s2.f1d: — Posts for all major platforms with hashtags
s2.f2d: — Punchy bios with clear value propositions
s2.f4d: — Full video scripts with hook and CTA
s2.f5d: — Condense long content into social snippets

s3.desc: Write high-converting email campaigns, sequences and subject lines that get opened and clicked.
s3.f1d: — Subject lines, body copy and CTAs

s4.desc: Write high-converting ads for Facebook, Instagram, Google and LinkedIn that drive real results.
s4.f1d: — 3 ad variants with headlines and copy
s4.f4d: — Short urgent copy that drives clicks
s4.f5d: — Video ad scripts optimized for TikTok

s5.desc: Rank higher on Google with AI-powered SEO tools for keywords, meta tags and content optimization.
s5.f1d: — Title tags and meta descriptions for Google
s5.f3d: — SEO-rich FAQ sections for any topic
s5.f4d: — SEO score, readability and keyword density

s6.desc: Write product descriptions, listings and review replies that turn browsers into buyers on Shopify and Amazon.
s6.f1d: — Persuasive copy for Shopify and Amazon
s6.f4d: — Push content directly to your store
s6.f5d: — Publish blog content directly to WordPress

s7.desc: Close more deals with AI-written sales emails, cold outreach, pitch scripts and follow-up sequences.

s8.desc: Your complete AI productivity hub — chat assistant, bulk generation, document management and developer API.
s8.f2d: — Create up to 20 pieces of content at once
s8.f3d: — Save, organize and manage all generated content
s8.f4d: — Use AI tools inside your own apps
s8.f5d: — Collaborate with your team in one place

s9.desc: Track your AI visibility, monitor brand mentions in AI answers and benchmark against competitors across every major AI platform.
s9.f1d: — See how your brand appears in AI-generated answers
s9.f2d: — Discover which prompts surface your brand in AI
s9.f3d: — Benchmark your AI presence vs. your rivals
s9.f4d: — Coverage across OpenAI, Anthropic and Google AI

hiw.title_html:
Up and running
in 4 simple steps
hiw.sub: From sign-up to published content — no training required, no credit card needed.
hiw.s1_desc: Create your account in 30 seconds — no credit card, no commitment.
hiw.s2_desc: Tell us about your business, tone, and audience — once, and AI remembers it.
hiw.s3_desc: Pick from 40+ tools across 9 AI systems — content, ads, email, SEO, and more.
hiw.s4_desc: Get polished, ready-to-use content in seconds. Publish to WordPress or Shopify in one click.

why.desc: Unlike generic AI tools, M-EasyTools AI+ is purpose-built for marketing — every tool is trained to produce conversion-focused content that actually works.
why.p1_desc: No OpenAI costs. Our platform uses Groq's LLaMA model — enterprise-grade AI at zero API cost.
why.p2_desc: What takes a copywriter hours takes M-EasyTools AI+ seconds. 40+ specialized tools, one platform.
why.p3_desc: Full Bahasa Malaysia interface. Priced for Malaysian SMEs. Powered by Modus AI Associates.
why.p4_desc: Generate content and publish it to your website or store in one click. No copy-pasting needed.

cta.desc: Join hundreds of Malaysian businesses using M-EasyTools AI+ to create better content, faster.

footer.copy: © 2025 M-EasyTools AI+ · Powered by Modus AI Associates
